string-array.name: mask_6c_select_action
string-array.item: Tag Matching is assert SL\r\nTag Not-Matching is deassert SL
Tag Matching is assert SL\r\nTag Not-Matching is do nothing
Tag Matching is do nothing\r\nTag Not-Matching is deassert SL
Tag Matching is negate SL\r\nTag Not-Matching is do nothing
Tag Matching is deassert SL\r\nTag Not-Matching is assert SL
Tag Matching is deassert SL\r\nTag Not-Matching is do nothing
Tag Matching is do nothing\r\nTag Not-Matching is assert SL
Tag Matching is do nothing\r\nTag Not-Matching is negate SL

string-array.name: mask_6c_session_action
string-array.item: Tag Matching is inventoriedâ†’A\r\nTag Not-Matching is inventoriedâ†’B
